name: Wood and Fabric Vinyl Decorative Storage Cabinet - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Store newspapers, blankets and other items out of sight with the Wood and Fabric Vinyl Decorative Storage Cabinet from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This storage cabinet comes with built-in shelves and a door with fabric detailing to give you enough space for your belongings. Made with a wooden frame, this storage cabinet has a metal stand-like base for a mid-century modern look.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
